headline: Toilet Paper Company Announces 'Eco-Friendly' Version Made From Old Jokes
summary: Now even your bathroom breaks can be recycled humor.
fullBody: SoftScroll Inc. claims their new product is made from repurposed dad jokes and political memes. Early testers report mixed results - some say it's 'punny' while others find it 'cringe-worthy.' The company promises 'maximum absorption of bad puns.'
